evaluations.query: Here's a claude.ai/design URL — give me a reviewable PR back
expected_behavior: Imports the handoff bundle, then generates Storybook stories and Playwright tests
Runs diff-aware browser verification on the scaffolded components
Opens a PR with the bundle URL, before/after screenshots, and a coverage delta in the body

evaluations.query: Ship this design but the bundle import fails partway through
expected_behavior: Stops and does NOT proceed to test generation against partially-imported components
Reports the import failure rather than producing a half-built PR

evaluations.query: The browser verification step finds visual diffs during ship
expected_behavior: Does not block the PR on verification findings
Reports the findings and continues to open the reviewable PR

evaluations.query: Just scaffold the components from this bundle, I don't want tests or a PR yet
expected_behavior: Recognizes this is import-and-scaffold only, not the full ship-to-PR workflow
Routes to design-import rather than running the end-to-end pipeline
